## Summary

Describe the change and its user-visible effect.

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run check` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] Tests were added or updated where behavior changed
- [ ] No sensitive or production-derived fixture data is included
- [ ] Big5 or fixed-width changes were verified at the byte level
- [ ] Documentation was updated where the output contract changed
- [ ] No new runtime network request or telemetry was introduced

## Screenshots or output bytes

Include UI screenshots or a short hexadecimal byte comparison when relevant.
